allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); contas=d.get\('contas',{}\); [print\(f'conta {k}: atendidas_dados={len\(v.get\(\\"atendidas_dados\\",[]\)\)} items'\) for k,v in contas.items\(\)]; [print\(json.dumps\(item, indent=2\)\) for k,v in contas.items\(\) for item in \(v.get\('atendidas_dados'\) or []\)[:2]]")
